<!--
Thanks for contributing to AVIOR! Please keep pull requests focused.
See .github/CONTRIBUTING.md for the full workflow.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related

<!-- Link the issue and/or the PRD functional requirement this addresses,
     e.g. "Closes #NN", "FR-SCAN-3". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation / packaging
- [ ] Refactor (no behavioural change)
- [ ] PRD / file-contract revision (explain below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated under `tests/testthat/` (this project is test-first)
- [ ] Fixtures kept in sync (no `test-fixture-drift` failures)
- [ ] `NEWS.md` updated with a user-facing entry
- [ ] `man/*.Rd` and `NAMESPACE` updated for any exported-API change
- [ ] `R CMD check --as-cran` is clean, lint passes, coverage stays ≥ 80%
- [ ] Generated artifacts remain deterministic / byte-identical (FR-X-7 / FR-X-8)
- [ ] Any change to a frozen file contract (PRD §6) is accompanied by a PRD revision

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
